= inline-image-test(1)
:doctype: manpage
:manmanual: Test Manual
:mansource: Test 1.0
:revdate: 2025-06-01

== Name

inline-image-test - test image placeholders

== Synopsis

*inline-image-test*

== Description

An inline image: image:logo.png[Company Logo].

An inline image without alt text: image:icon.png[].

.A block image
image::sunset.jpg[Sunset photo]

image::untitled.png[]
